info.name: Twilio - Accounts
info.description:
This is the public Twilio REST API.

Contact Support:
 Name: Twilio Support
 Email: support@twilio.com

request.description: Promote the secondary Auth Token to primary. After promoting the new token, all requests to Twilio using your old primary Auth Token will result in an error.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

request.description: Create a new secondary Auth Token

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

request.description: Delete the secondary Auth Token from your account

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

variable.description: (Required) The Twilio-provided string that uniquely identifies the AWS resource to fetch.

request.description: Fetch the AWS credentials specified by the provided Credential Sid

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

urlencoded.description: A descriptive string that you create to describe the resource. It can be up to 64 characters long.

variable.description: (Required) The Twilio-provided string that uniquely identifies the AWS resource to update.

request.description: Modify the properties of a given Account

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

urlencoded.description: A descriptive string that you create to describe the resource. It can be up to 64 characters long.

variable.description: (Required) The Twilio-provided string that uniquely identifies the AWS resource to delete.

request.description: Delete a Credential from your account

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

query.description: How many resources to return in each list page. The default is 50, and the maximum is 1000.
The page index. This value is simply for client state.
The page token. This is provided by the API.

request.description: Retrieves a collection of AWS Credentials belonging to the account used to make the request

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

query.description: How many resources to return in each list page. The default is 50, and the maximum is 1000.
The page index. This value is simply for client state.
The page token. This is provided by the API.

urlencoded.description: (Required) A string that contains the AWS access credentials in the format `<AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID>:<AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY>`. For example, `AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE:wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY`
A descriptive string that you create to describe the resource. It can be up to 64 characters long.
The SID of the Subaccount that this Credential should be associated with. Must be a valid Subaccount of the account issuing the request.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

urlencoded.description: (Required) A string that contains the AWS access credentials in the format `<AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID>:<AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY>`. For example, `AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE:wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY`
A descriptive string that you create to describe the resource. It can be up to 64 characters long.
The SID of the Subaccount that this Credential should be associated with. Must be a valid Subaccount of the account issuing the request.

variable.description: (Required) The Twilio-provided string that uniquely identifies the PublicKey resource to fetch.

request.description: Fetch the public key specified by the provided Credential Sid

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

urlencoded.description: A descriptive string that you create to describe the resource. It can be up to 64 characters long.

variable.description: (Required) The Twilio-provided string that uniquely identifies the PublicKey resource to update.

request.description: Modify the properties of a given Account

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

urlencoded.description: A descriptive string that you create to describe the resource. It can be up to 64 characters long.

variable.description: (Required) The Twilio-provided string that uniquely identifies the PublicKey resource to delete.

request.description: Delete a Credential from your account

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

query.description: How many resources to return in each list page. The default is 50, and the maximum is 1000.
The page index. This value is simply for client state.
The page token. This is provided by the API.

request.description: Retrieves a collection of Public Key Credentials belonging to the account used to make the request

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

query.description: How many resources to return in each list page. The default is 50, and the maximum is 1000.
The page index. This value is simply for client state.
The page token. This is provided by the API.

urlencoded.description: (Required) A URL encoded representation of the public key. For example, `--BEGIN PUBLIC KEY--MIIBIjANB.pa9xQIDAQAB--END PUBLIC KEY--`
A descriptive string that you create to describe the resource. It can be up to 64 characters long.
The SID of the Subaccount that this Credential should be associated with. Must be a valid Subaccount of the account issuing the request

request.description: Create a new Public Key Credential

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

urlencoded.description: (Required) A URL encoded representation of the public key. For example, `--BEGIN PUBLIC KEY--MIIBIjANB.pa9xQIDAQAB--END PUBLIC KEY--`
A descriptive string that you create to describe the resource. It can be up to 64 characters long.
The SID of the Subaccount that this Credential should be associated with. Must be a valid Subaccount of the account issuing the request
(Required) The phone number to be added in SafeList. Phone numbers must be in [E.164 format](https://www.twilio.com/docs/glossary/what-e164).

request.description: Add a new phone number to SafeList.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

urlencoded.description: (Required) The phone number to be added in SafeList. Phone numbers must be in [E.164 format](https://www.twilio.com/docs/glossary/what-e164).

query.description: The phone number to be fetched from SafeList. Phone numbers must be in [E.164 format](https://www.twilio.com/docs/glossary/what-e164).

request.description: Check if a phone number exists in SafeList.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

query.description: The phone number to be fetched from SafeList. Phone numbers must be in [E.164 format](https://www.twilio.com/docs/glossary/what-e164).
The phone number to be removed from SafeList. Phone numbers must be in [E.164 format](https://www.twilio.com/docs/glossary/what-e164).

request.description: Remove a phone number from SafeList.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

query.description: The phone number to be removed from SafeList. Phone numbers must be in [E.164 format](https://www.twilio.com/docs/glossary/what-e164).
